description_long: This is a modern passenger train car with a streamlined, elongated body and a dark exterior finish. The sides feature a series of rectangular windows, some grouped and some spaced apart, allowing natural light into the passenger compartment. A thin horizontal stripe runs along the lower part of the car, adding a touch of color and visual separation from the undercarriage. The undercarriage is equipped with two sets of bogies, each with visible wheels and suspension components. There are no visible overhead wires or pantographs, suggesting it is not an electric train reliant on catenary systems. The ends of the car are flat with what appear to be connector doors for passage between cars.
description: A sleek, dark-colored passenger train car with rectangular windows and a horizontal accent stripe, designed for urban rail transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat end of the train car with a connector door and minimal detailing.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the car, with a row of rectangular windows and a horizontal stripe along the lower body.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, featuring a flat end with a connector door and undercarriage details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the window arrangement and horizontal stripe, mirroring the other side.
